---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see in detail. Include:

- How the user would interact with this feature
- UI/UX considerations (if applicable)
- API changes (if applicable)
- Configuration changes (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my adoption
- [ ] High - very useful but I can work around it
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor enhancement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR to implement this feature
- [ ] I'm willing to test this feature when it's implemented
- [ ] I'm willing to help document this feature
